svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 17px; margin-left: 750px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: RS-232C / RS-485 / GPIO UART 物理層接続パターン

fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.div:
パターン 1
RS-232C
(単点・全二重)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 148px; height: 1px; padding-top: 180px; margin-left: 181px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 180px; margin-left: 451px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(85, 85, 85), rgb(164, 164, 164));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 180px; margin-left: 791px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 478px; height: 1px; padding-top: 175px; margin-left: 992px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
• 全二重 / 1:1 / ケーブル長 ≤ 15 m
• 電気仕様: ±3〜±15 V、シングルエンド (シールド推奨)
• 産業環境ではフォトカプラ・パルストランスによるアイソレーション必須
• チップ選定基準: Linux kernel の ftdi_sio / cp210x / ch341 ドライバ対応

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.div:
パターン 2
RS-485
(差動・マルチドロップ)

div.div:
USB-RS485 変換
(アイソレータ + 終端抵抗)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(85, 85, 85), rgb(164, 164, 164));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 365px; margin-left: 791px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 162, 79), rgb(134, 89, 18));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 478px; height: 1px; padding-top: 440px; margin-left: 992px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
• 半二重 (2 線式) / マスタ (Pi) が順次ポーリング
• 電気仕様: 差動 (A/B ペア) / ケーブル長 ≤ 1200 m
• 両端に終端抵抗 120 Ω、バイアス抵抗が必要
• 太線は RS-485 マルチドロップバス (A/B 差動ペア)
• Modbus RTU / BACnet MS/TP / PROFIBUS DP 等が載る
• 機器 GND 間の電位差対策でガルバニックアイソレーション必須

div.div:
パターン 3
GPIO UART 直結
(非推奨・検証用)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 148px; height: 1px; padding-top: 690px; margin-left: 181px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Raspberry Pi GPIO
(3.3 V TTL UART)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 690px; margin-left: 451px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
MAX3232 IC
(3.3 V TTL ⇔ ±12 V 変換)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(85, 85, 85), rgb(164, 164, 164));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 690px; margin-left: 791px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 478px; height: 1px; padding-top: 685px; margin-left: 992px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
• Pi 単体で GPIO から UART を取り出す構成
• 3.3 V TTL のままでは RS-232C 機器に接続不可、MAX3232 等のレベル変換 IC 必須
• アイソレーション無しでは Pi の GPIO が焼損するリスクあり
• シリアルコンソール用途と競合しがち、/boot/config.txt の設定変更必要
• 本番配線では USB-Serial (パターン 1) を推奨
